case_title: BOURGAULT, MICHELLE VS LIMA, VICTOR DBA MISSION IRON WORKS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIMA, VICTOR DBA MISSION IRON WORKS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY BOURGAULT, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT LIMA, VICTOR DBA MISSION IRON WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOURGAULT, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIMA, VICTOR DBA MISSION IRON WORKS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00, DEFT TO REMOVE FIRE ESCAPE LADDER FROM PLTF'S PROPERTY BY NOV. 2, 2001. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
